title: rhododendron websterianum
intro: Rhododendron websterianum is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is commonly known as the Webster's rhododendron, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron websterianum include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for the treatment of various health conditions.
